status_vocabulary.produced: A foundation artefact exists, but its release acceptance gate has not been passed.
status_vocabulary.in_progress: Implementation or evidence remains incomplete for the release contract.
status_vocabulary.blocked: The remaining work requires authority that has not been granted.

requirement_status_groups.name: fixture_profile_and_discovery_foundation
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The semantic, publication, Explorer and read-only discovery foundations run against a representative fixture. A no-skip real-Chromium browser gate now covers accessibility-relevant behaviour, deep links, Pages fallback, gzip and budgets, but localhost/browser execution was refused in the current restricted run. Axe, expert, participant and full-corpus evidence remain pending.

requirement_status_groups.name: official_source_audit_foundation
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The dated public-source audit and preflight exist. The fixture rights/privacy scan has zero hard body/credential findings and two policy-controlled structural review triggers, but it does not substitute for T0/T1 source-union closure, the final snapshot-bound rights scan, or citation verification.

requirement_status_groups.name: persona_and_story_design_foundation
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The machine-applicable persona gate passes for 48 evidenced research hypotheses, 17 cross-cutting overlays, 11 required dimensions, all 83 pinned schema families, exhaustive 136-pair overlay scenarios, five high-risk t-way scenarios and two successive held-out no-new challenge passes. One genuine omission, privacy-sensitive context, was added as a contract-supported hypothesis. Human validation remains not authorised, evidence claim-support verification remains an F2 dependency, and the six release-v2 stories per persona must still be regenerated against the final snapshot; no UI preference claim is made.

requirement_status_groups.name: deterministic_execution_foundation
requirement_status_groups.qualification: Deterministic orchestration, bounded contracts, a hash-chained append-only activity contract, separate product/paid-API/source-request accounting, explicit access fallbacks, zero-paid-model policy, locked-dependency SBOM and isolated fixture reproduction exist. A completed repository-wide Codex Security campaign records 14 original findings, three residual low findings and their remediation at commit 27890dc; 32 focused post-fix tests pass. This is pre-release evidence only: T0 hydration, T1/closing, evaluation, final-snapshot security scanning, publication, independent adjudication and full-snapshot clean-room terminal evidence remain release work.

requirement_status_groups.name: full_corpus_and_capacity
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The unsampled T0 union census is closed and integrity-checked: 848,977 candidate keys, 836,998 publication records, 137 opposing-pass Search partitions, 35 byte-stable sitemap shards, closed organisations/navigation, six redirects and zero unexplained omissions. A 75,000-page deterministic rendered-link detector preserves the shared request reserve. The resumable hydrator derives and enforces the launch-manifest 10 GiB retained-metadata ceiling, clears redundant completed inputs, reserves SQLite writes and verifies durable exports before transient cleanup. T0 hydration, T1 re-enumeration, closing delta and final zero-omission release reconciliation remain in progress.

requirement_status_groups.name: release_question_matrix
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The corpus-anchored v2 generator and separate verifier exist. They have not run against a complete release snapshot; the checked-in v1 matrix is development-only and cannot pass the question gate.

requirement_status_groups.name: evaluation_comparison_and_assessment
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The deterministic matched evaluation harness, baselines, ablations, trace shards, metrics, cluster confidence intervals, slices and failure analysis are implemented and fixture-tested. A deterministic nine-aim assessment now maps all 95 requirements and 21 controlling clauses to exact hashed evidence, negative findings, exceptions and next actions; it honestly reports eight partly fulfilled aims and one not yet testable aim while Gate 11 remains pending. The complete 28,800-question release run and participant results remain outstanding.

requirement_status_groups.name: citation_and_research_verification
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The source preflight covers 32/32 official and 93/93 plan URLs while preserving superseded access failures. Independent ledgers verify 171/171 citation bindings and 40/40 joint claims with zero waivers or blockers. The evidence is currently bound to the fixture release identifier and must be regenerated with the final closing snapshot before publication.

requirement_status_groups.name: final_machine_status
requirement_status_groups.qualification: The fixture now reproduces exactly in a clean temporary directory and has a lock-bound SBOM, while clean_room_reproduction_passed remains false. The current status is not the final 95-requirement release disposition.

requirement_status_groups.name: human_ui_of_choice_evidence
requirement_status_groups.qualification: No participant-study authority was supplied. The UI-of-choice claim must remain not_yet_testable.

task_status_groups.qualification: An implementation or design artefact exists; task promotion and release acceptance are not implied.

The repository-wide and remediation-diff Codex Security scans are documented, all 17 reported findings are remediated through commit 27890dc, and 32 focused post-fix tests pass. This does not satisfy the eventual full-corpus release-snapshot security gate.
The task's declared promotion gate has not been satisfied.
Human research requires ethics, recruitment, consent, accommodation and participant-data authority.
